# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

class PageRouter {
    private $templatesDir;
    private $defaultPage;
    
    public function __construct($templatesDir = 'templates', $defaultPage = 'home') {
        $this->templatesDir = rtrim($templatesDir, '/\\');
        $this->defaultPage = $defaultPage;
    }
    
    public function route() {
        $page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : $this->defaultPage;
        
        $templatePath = $this->getSecureTemplatePath($page);
        
        if ($templatePath && file_exists($templatePath)) {
            include $templatePath;
        } else {
            $this->show404();
        }
    }
    
    private function getSecureTemplatePath($page) {
        $page = basename($page);
        $page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/', '', $page);
        
        if (empty($page)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        $templateFile = $page . '.php';
        $requestedPath = $this->templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $templateFile;
        
        $realTemplatesDir = realpath($this->templatesDir);
        if ($realTemplatesDir === false) {
            return false;
        }
        
        $realRequestedPath = realpath($requestedPath);
        
        if ($realRequestedPath === false) {
            return false;
        }
        
        if (strpos($realRequestedPath, $realTemplatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) !== 0) {
            return false;
        }
        
        return $realRequestedPath;
    }
    
    private function show404() {
        http_response_code(404);
        $notFoundPath = $this->templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . '404.php';
        
        if (file_exists($notFoundPath)) {
            include $notFoundPath;
        } else {
            echo '<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>404 - Page Not Found</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>404 - Page Not Found</h1>
    <p>The requested page could not be found.</p>
</body>
</html>';
        }
    }
}

$router = new PageRouter('templates', 'home');
$router->route();

?>
